series_metadata.series_description: Review of the general and critical areas of a sponsoring agency''s Child Nutrition Program.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain review files for three years plus the current year or until next review cycle. If an agency is terminated for cause, retain until removed from National Disqualified List or State Disqualified List (a minimum of seven years) and/or until any outstanding debt is paid to USDA; if an appeal is filed then transfer to appeal file. ; Electronic: Retain review files for three years plus the current year or until next review cycle. If an agency is terminated for cause, retain until removed from National Disqualified List or State Disqualified List (a minimum of seven years) and/or until any outstanding debt is paid to USDA; if an appeal is filed then transfer to appeal file., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
